---
mode: 'agent'
description: 'Estratégia e implementação de testes. Usa test-engineer agent com pirâmide Unit>Int>E2E.'
---

Read the file `.agent/workflows/test.md` and follow ALL instructions defined there.
Also read `.agent/agents/test-engineer.md` to activate the test-engineer agent.

What to test: $ARGUMENTS

Apply testing pyramid: Unit > Integration > E2E. Use AAA pattern (Arrange, Act, Assert).
